layout.app_container: flex h-screen w-full bg-[#080C16] text-slate-300 overflow-hidden font-sans selection:bg-blue-500/30
layout.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-white/[0.08] bg-[#0A0F1C]/40 backdrop-blur-2xl flex flex-col z-20
layout.main_content: flex-1 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden relative z-10
layout.header: h-20 border-b border-white/[0.08] bg-[#080C16]/60 backdrop-blur-xl flex items-center px-8 justify-between shrink-0
layout.grid: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto w-full
layout.right_panel: col-span-1 lg:col-span-7 flex flex-col gap-6 h-full min-h-[600px]

surfaces.glass_card: bg-[#0D1322]/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/[0.08] rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-2xl shadow-black/50
surfaces.upload_zone: border-2 border-dashed border-white/[0.15] bg-[#0D1322]/20 rounded-xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center hover:bg-white/[0.02] hover:border-blue-500/40 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer group
surfaces.code_panel: bg-[#03060C] rounded-xl border border-white/[0.08] overflow-hidden flex flex-col h-full shadow-inner

components.button_primary: w-full bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(37,99,235,0.15)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(37,99,235,0.3)] flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.button_secondary: bg-white/[0.03] hover:bg-white/[0.08] text-slate-200 border border-white/[0.08] hover:border-white/[0.15] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all flex items-center gap-2 shadow-sm
components.input: w-full bg-[#03060C] border border-white/[0.1] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/40 focus:border-blue-500/50 transition-all placeholder:text-slate-600 shadow-inner
components.select: w-full bg-[#03060C] border border-white/[0.1] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/40 focus:border-blue-500/50 appearance-none cursor-pointer shadow-inner
components.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl mx-4 text-sm font-medium transition-all text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/[0.05] group
components.sidebar_item_active: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl mx-4 text-sm font-medium bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/20 shadow-[inset_0_0_12px_rgba(59,130,246,0.1)]

icons.usage: Use icons: Database, FileJson, LayoutTemplate, Download, UploadCloud, Copy, Check, TerminalSquare, Loader2, ArrowRight, FolderArchive

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a modern single-page React app focusing on high-end developer tool aesthetics.
Ensure all backgrounds use the Dark Navy color scheme. Do NOT use standard flat #000 or #111 blacks. Use the specified hex codes (e.g., #080C16).
Avoid Inter font for headings; stick to system sans-serif or explicitly import Outfit/Geist if possible. Use standard monospaced fonts for the code output.
Implement the layout with a 64-width fixed sidebar on the left and a top header containing title and subtitle.
Main body uses a 12-column grid. Left 5 cols: Upload Card and Configuration Card. Right 7 cols: SQL Output Panel.
All interactive elements (inputs, dropdowns, buttons, upload zone) MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="upload-zone"`, `data-testid="generate-btn"`).
Upload Card: Should show a dashed border, an upload icon, and text instructing to drag-drop ZIP. Implement a subtle hover state.

Configuration Card: Needs inputs for 'Workspace', 'Application ID', and a select dropdown for 'APEX Version' with options (22.2, 23.1, 23.2, 24.1, 24.2, 26.1). Include an 'Optional Toggle: Run npm build'.
Generate Button: Implement a click state that shows a loading spinner (lucide-react Loader2) and changes text to 'Generating...'.

SQL Output Panel: A dark code-block area with a header containing a 'Copy SQL' button. The output should simulate syntax highlighting using simple spans or Tailwind text colors (e.g., text-purple-400 for keywords like CREATE OR REPLACE, text-green-400 for strings).
Copy Button: On click, change icon to a Check and text to 'Copied!' for 2 seconds.
Implement glassmorphism heavily across the cards using backdrop-blur-xl and low opacity white borders/backgrounds.
Ensure typography hierarchy is crisp. Labels should be small, uppercase, and widely tracked.
Use standard Tailwind CSS classes to achieve all visual styling.
